summary: Tested major screening overhaul: Screening Sessions tab in Settings, active period persistence, Screening page period badge, SAEBRS flow with per-student save, completion persistence, and StudentProfilePage self_report_results. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Screening overhaul fully tested. Settings > Screening Sessions tab has 8 period buttons (data-testid: period-btn-Term-1-P1 etc). Active period persists via PUT /api/settings. Screening page shows 'Active period: Term 1 - P1' badge. SAEBRS flow: class selection → student list with 'X of 63 completed' counter + Finish Session btn → per-student form → save marks student as Completed with checkmark. Persistence confirmed on reload (GET /api/screening/completed works). StudentProfilePage profile endpoint returns self_report_results key correctly.

test_results.8_period_buttons: PASS - All 8 period buttons found and clickable
test_results.save_active_period: PASS - PUT /api/settings saves active_screening_period, GET returns it
test_results.screening_page_active_badge: PASS - Shows 'Active period: Term 1 - P1' badge
test_results.saebrs_period_badge: PASS - Shows 'Term 1 - P1' badge in SAEBRS class select
test_results.finish_session_btn: PASS - Always visible on student list
test_results.completion_counter: PASS - '0 of 63 completed' / '1 of 63 completed' updates correctly
test_results.per_student_save: PASS - Harper Allen marked Completed with green checkmark after save
test_results.persistence_on_reload: PASS - '1 of 63 completed' + progress banner shown on return visit
test_results.progress_banner: PASS - 'Your progress is saved. You can close this page...' message shown
